task_name: add Mistral Instruct v3 chat template

details.reasoning: Implementation is nearly complete and well-structured. All requirements are met except for one critical detail: the handler uses COMMON_CHAT_FORMAT_PEG_NATIVE instead of the required COMMON_CHAT_FORMAT_CONTENT_ONLY for the format field (line 1677). All other requirements are correctly implemented: the new function is properly defined, user turns are correctly wrapped with [INST]/[/INST] markers, system messages are prepended to the first user turn, </s> is appended after assistant turns, template auto-detection is properly registered with [SYSTEM_PROMPT] absence check, LOG_DBG call is present, handler is correctly dispatched with (tmpl, params), and no existing code is modified.
